requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / MEPS — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SAZ / ZERA energy programmes)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/MEPS——家用制冷器具（SAZ / ZERA能效计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/MEPS——家用製冷器具（SAZ / ZERA能效計畫）

summary.en: Zimbabwe is progressively developing minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) and energy-efficiency programmes for appliances, driven by the Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) and supported by SAZ standards work, often informed by regional approaches (Southern African Development Community / South African SANS energy frameworks). For household refrigerating appliances, the measurement basis is expected to follow the IEC 62552 series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods), adopted as ZWS / aligned with SANS, which is the same international test family used for energy ratings in many markets. Unlike the EU, Zimbabwe does not (as of this informational snapshot) operate a binding EU-style Ecodesign EEI regulation with EPREL-type pre-registration for refrigerators; the precise status of mandatory MEPS thresholds and any required energy declaration for refrigerators should be confirmed directly with ZERA and SAZ, as programmes are evolving. Exporters should design to a competitive efficiency level and be prepared to provide IEC 62552-based test data.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦正逐步制定器具的最低能效性能标准（MEPS）及能效计划，由津巴布韦能源监管局（ZERA）主导并由SAZ标准工作支持，常借鉴区域做法（南部非洲发展共同体/南非SANS能效框架）。对于家用制冷器具，测量基础预计遵循IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法），采用为ZWS/与SANS对齐，这是许多市场用于能效评级的同一国际试验族。与欧盟不同，截至本信息快照，津巴布韦尚未对冰箱实施欧盟式具约束力的生态设计EEI法规及类EPREL的预注册；冰箱强制MEPS门槛及任何所需能效声明的确切状态，应直接向ZERA和SAZ确认，因计划仍在演进。出口商应按具竞争力的能效水平设计，并准备提供基于IEC 62552的检测数据。
summary.zht: 辛巴威正逐步制定器具的最低能效性能標準（MEPS）及能效計畫，由辛巴威能源監管局（ZERA）主導並由SAZ標準工作支持，常借鑒區域做法（南部非洲發展共同體/南非SANS能效框架）。對於家用製冷器具，測量基礎預計遵循IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法），採用為ZWS/與SANS對齊，這是許多市場用於能效評級的同一國際試驗族。與歐盟不同，截至本資訊快照，辛巴威尚未對冰箱實施歐盟式具約束力的生態設計EEI法規及類EPREL的預登記；冰箱強制MEPS門檻及任何所需能效聲明的確切狀態，應直接向ZERA和SAZ確認，因計畫仍在演進。出口商應按具競爭力的能效水平設計，並準備提供基於IEC 62552的檢測數據。

standards_or_laws: Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) — national energy regulator; energy-efficiency / MEPS programmes for appliances (status evolving)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — adoption of energy test-method and MEPS standards as ZWS
IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (expected measurement basis; adopted as ZWS / aligned with SANS)
Regional reference frameworks (SADC / South African SANS appliance energy programmes) commonly informing Zimbabwe MEPS development

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), establishing grades (Grade 1 most efficient to Grade 5 minimum) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered by NDRC. Test methods follow GB/T 8059 (aligned with the IEC 62552 series). Because GB 12021.2 uses a Chinese grade framework and a domestic label, Chinese energy grades and the China Energy Label do not automatically translate into a Zimbabwe MEPS pass or a Zimbabwe energy declaration; the underlying IEC 62552 test data, however, is a common technical foundation.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效至5级最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识由发改委（NDRC）管理。试验方法遵循GB/T 8059（与IEC 62552系列对齐）。由于GB 12021.2采用中国等级框架及国内标识，中国能效等级及中国能效标识不会自动等同于津巴布韦MEPS通过或津巴布韦能效声明；但底层IEC 62552检测数据为共同技术基础。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效至5級最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識由發改委（NDRC）管理。試驗方法遵循GB/T 8059（與IEC 62552系列對齊）。由於GB 12021.2採用中國等級框架及國內標識，中國能效等級及中國能效標識不會自動等同於辛巴威MEPS通過或辛巴威能效聲明；但底層IEC 62552檢測數據為共同技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test methods (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: The gap is mainly about scheme acceptance and evolving local requirements rather than fundamentally different test physics: (1) No automatic recognition — a Chinese Grade 1/2 rating or the China Energy Label is not a Zimbabwe MEPS pass; exporters must meet whatever MEPS threshold ZERA/SAZ specify and, where applicable, provide a local energy declaration in the prescribed form. (2) Evolving / uncertain mandatory scope — unlike the EU's binding Ecodesign EEI plus EPREL pre-registration, Zimbabwe's refrigerator MEPS / labelling programme is developing; the current mandatory status and thresholds must be confirmed with ZERA and SAZ rather than assumed. (3) Common test basis helps — because both GB/T 8059 and the expected ZWS measurement standard derive from IEC 62552, existing IEC 62552 test data is the most reusable evidence and should be retained. There is no EU-style EPREL pre-registration database obligation in Zimbabwe at this informational snapshot.
gap.zh: 差距主要在于制度接受度及不断演进的本地要求，而非根本不同的测试原理：（1）无自动认可——中国1级/2级评定或中国能效标识不等于津巴布韦MEPS通过；出口商须满足ZERA/SAZ规定的MEPS门槛，并在适用时按规定形式提供本地能效声明。（2）演进中/不确定的强制范围——与欧盟具约束力的生态设计EEI加EPREL预注册不同，津巴布韦的冰箱MEPS/标识计划仍在发展；当前强制状态及门槛须向ZERA和SAZ确认，不应臆断。（3）共同测试基础有利——由于GB/T 8059与预期的ZWS测量标准均源自IEC 62552，现有IEC 62552检测数据是最可复用的证据，应予保留。截至本信息快照，津巴布韦无欧盟式EPREL预注册数据库义务。
gap.zht: 差距主要在於制度接受度及不斷演進的本地要求，而非根本不同的測試原理：（1）無自動認可——中國1級/2級評定或中國能效標識不等於辛巴威MEPS通過；出口商須滿足ZERA/SAZ規定的MEPS門檻，並在適用時按規定形式提供本地能效聲明。（2）演進中/不確定的強制範圍——與歐盟具約束力的生態設計EEI加EPREL預登記不同，辛巴威的冰箱MEPS/標識計畫仍在發展；當前強制狀態及門檻須向ZERA和SAZ確認，不應臆斷。（3）共同測試基礎有利——由於GB/T 8059與預期的ZWS測量標準均源自IEC 62552，現有IEC 62552檢測數據是最可複用的證據，應予保留。截至本資訊快照，辛巴威無歐盟式EPREL預登記數據庫義務。

mandatory_status.target: Evolving — Zimbabwe MEPS / appliance energy-efficiency programmes (ZERA / SAZ) are developing; mandatory refrigerator MEPS thresholds and any energy declaration should be confirmed directly with ZERA and SAZ. No EU-style binding Ecodesign EEI regulation or EPREL pre-registration applies at this snapshot.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe's refrigerator MEPS / energy-efficiency programme (ZERA / SAZ) is developing and likely uses the IEC 62552 test basis. A Chinese Grade 1/2 rating or the China Energy Label does not auto-qualify for Zimbabwe; confirm current mandatory MEPS thresholds and any local energy declaration with ZERA and SAZ. Retain IEC 62552 test data as the most reusable evidence. No EU-style EEI/EPREL pre-registration applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦的冰箱MEPS/能效计划（ZERA / SAZ）仍在发展中，可能采用IEC 62552测试基础。中国1级/2级评定或中国能效标识不会自动符合津巴布韦要求；须向ZERA和SAZ确认当前强制MEPS门槛及任何本地能效声明。应保留IEC 62552检测数据作为最可复用的证据。不适用欧盟式EEI/EPREL预注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威的冰箱MEPS/能效計畫（ZERA / SAZ）仍在發展中，可能採用IEC 62552測試基礎。中國1級/2級評定或中國能效標識不會自動符合辛巴威要求；須向ZERA和SAZ確認當前強制MEPS門檻及任何本地能效聲明。應保留IEC 62552檢測數據作為最可複用的證據。不適用歐盟式EEI/EPREL預登記。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Appliance Energy Label (SAZ / ZERA; no EPREL-type pre-registration)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——器具能效标签（SAZ / ZERA；无类EPREL预注册）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——器具能效標籤（SAZ / ZERA；無類EPREL預登記）

summary.en: Where an appliance energy label is required in Zimbabwe, it is administered through ZERA energy-efficiency programmes with SAZ standards support, and tends to follow regional comparative-label approaches (such as the South African SANS comparative energy label format) rather than the EU rescaled A-to-G label. The label typically communicates an efficiency class and the annual energy consumption (kWh/annum) measured to the IEC 62552 series. Importantly, Zimbabwe does not (at this informational snapshot) operate an EU-style EPREL pre-registration database for refrigerators — there is no equivalent mandatory online product-registry filing before market placement. The exact label design, mandatory scope, and whether a refrigerator energy label is currently compulsory should be confirmed directly with ZERA and SAZ, since the programme is evolving and may align with SADC regional harmonisation over time.
summary.zh: 在津巴布韦需要器具能效标签时，该标签由ZERA能效计划管理并以SAZ标准支持，倾向于遵循区域比较标签做法（如南非SANS比较能效标签格式），而非欧盟重新评级的A至G标签。标签通常传达能效等级及按IEC 62552系列测得的年耗电量（千瓦时/年）。重要的是，截至本信息快照，津巴布韦不设欧盟式EPREL冰箱预注册数据库——投放市场前无同等的强制在线产品注册申报。确切的标签设计、强制范围及冰箱能效标签当前是否强制，应直接向ZERA和SAZ确认，因计划仍在演进，并可能随时间与SADC区域协调对齐。
summary.zht: 在辛巴威需要器具能效標籤時，該標籤由ZERA能效計畫管理並以SAZ標準支持，傾向於遵循區域比較標籤做法（如南非SANS比較能效標籤格式），而非歐盟重新評級的A至G標籤。標籤通常傳達能效等級及按IEC 62552系列測得的年耗電量（千瓦時/年）。重要的是，截至本資訊快照，辛巴威不設歐盟式EPREL冰箱預登記數據庫——投放市場前無同等的強制線上產品登記申報。確切的標籤設計、強制範圍及冰箱能效標籤當前是否強制，應直接向ZERA和SAZ確認，因計畫仍在演進，並可能隨時間與SADC區域協調對齊。

standards_or_laws: Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA) — administration of any appliance energy-label programme (status evolving)
Standards Association of Zimbabwe (SAZ) — energy-label and test-method standards as ZWS
IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for annual energy consumption shown on the label
Regional reference: South African SANS comparative energy label format / SADC harmonisation commonly informing the label design

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest) and annual energy consumption, administered via the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS). China uses self-declaration of grade based on GB 12021.2 testing and has no EPREL-type pre-registration database. The Chinese CEL is a domestic label and is structurally different from a Zimbabwe/SADC comparative label; it cannot serve as a Zimbabwe energy label without meeting the local format and requirements.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订），展示1至5级评级（1级最高）及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。中国采用基于GB 12021.2检测的等级自我声明，无类EPREL预注册数据库。中国CEL为国内标签，与津巴布韦/SADC比较标签结构不同；未满足本地格式及要求时不能充当津巴布韦能效标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂），展示1至5級評級（1級最高）及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。中國採用基於GB 12021.2檢測的等級自我聲明，無類EPREL預登記數據庫。中國CEL為國內標籤，與辛巴威/SADC比較標籤結構不同；未滿足本地格式及要求時不能充當辛巴威能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two practical differences relative to both China and the EU: (1) Label format — if a refrigerator energy label is required in Zimbabwe, it follows a regional comparative-label format (SANS/SADC-style), not the Chinese 1-to-5 CEL and not the EU A-to-G label; the Chinese CEL cannot be reused and a locally compliant label must be produced where required. (2) No EPREL-equivalent pre-registration — unlike the EU, Zimbabwe has no mandatory online product registry to file before market placement, so there is no EPREL-type hard gate; however, this also means evidence is checked at conformity assessment / import inspection rather than via a database, and IEC 62552 test data should be ready on request. Because the programme is evolving, exporters should confirm with ZERA/SAZ whether labelling is currently compulsory for refrigerators and obtain the exact label artwork specification before producing labels.
gap.zh: 相对于中国与欧盟的两点实务差异：（1）标签格式——若津巴布韦要求冰箱能效标签，其遵循区域比较标签格式（SANS/SADC式），既非中国1至5级CEL，也非欧盟A至G标签；中国CEL不可复用，须在要求时制作本地合规标签。（2）无类EPREL预注册——与欧盟不同，津巴布韦无投放市场前须申报的强制在线产品注册，故无EPREL式硬门槛；但这也意味着证据在合格评定/进口检验时核查，而非通过数据库，IEC 62552检测数据应备查。由于计划仍在演进，出口商应向ZERA/SAZ确认冰箱标识当前是否强制，并在制作标签前取得确切的标签图样规范。
gap.zht: 相對於中國與歐盟的兩點實務差異：（1）標籤格式——若辛巴威要求冰箱能效標籤，其遵循區域比較標籤格式（SANS/SADC式），既非中國1至5級CEL，也非歐盟A至G標籤；中國CEL不可複用，須在要求時製作本地合規標籤。（2）無類EPREL預登記——與歐盟不同，辛巴威無投放市場前須申報的強制線上產品登記，故無EPREL式硬門檻；但這也意味著證據在合格評定/進口檢驗時核查，而非通過數據庫，IEC 62552檢測數據應備查。由於計畫仍在演進，出口商應向ZERA/SAZ確認冰箱標識當前是否強制，並在製作標籤前取得確切的標籤圖樣規範。

mandatory_status.target: Evolving / conditional — any appliance energy label is administered by ZERA with SAZ standards and follows a regional comparative-label format; no EU-style EPREL pre-registration. Whether a refrigerator energy label is currently compulsory and its exact format should be confirmed with ZERA / SAZ.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Any Zimbabwe appliance energy label is ZERA/SAZ-administered and follows a regional comparative-label format, not the Chinese CEL or the EU A-to-G label, and there is no EPREL-type pre-registration gate. The Chinese CEL cannot be reused; produce a locally compliant label where required and keep IEC 62552 test data on hand. Confirm current mandatory scope and exact label artwork with ZERA and SAZ.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 任何津巴布韦器具能效标签均由ZERA/SAZ管理并遵循区域比较标签格式，既非中国CEL也非欧盟A至G标签，且无类EPREL预注册门槛。中国CEL不可复用；须在要求时制作本地合规标签并备妥IEC 62552检测数据。须向ZERA和SAZ确认当前强制范围及确切的标签图样。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 任何辛巴威器具能效標籤均由ZERA/SAZ管理並遵循區域比較標籤格式，既非中國CEL也非歐盟A至G標籤，且無類EPREL預登記門檻。中國CEL不可複用；須在要求時製作本地合規標籤並備妥IEC 62552檢測數據。須向ZERA和SAZ確認當前強制範圍及確切的標籤圖樣。
